pricing.title: Bundle

features: Early access to all future templates

faqs.question: What is a Framer template?
faqs.answer: A Framer template is a pre-designed website that you can customize and publish using Framer — a powerful no-code website builder. Think of it as a professional starting point that saves you weeks of design and development work.

faqs.question: Do I need coding skills?
faqs.answer: No coding skills are required! Framer is a visual website builder that allows you to edit text, images, colors, and layout directly on the canvas. Each template also comes with step-by-step video tutorials to guide you through the customization process.

faqs.question: Can I use the template for multiple sites?
faqs.answer: A single template license allows you to use it on one website. If you need to use templates on multiple sites, the Bundle plan gives you access to all templates with unlimited site usage.

faqs.question: Do I get free updates?
faqs.answer: Yes! All templates come with lifetime updates. Whenever we improve a template or add new features, you'll get access to those updates at no extra cost.

faqs.question: What if I need help?
faqs.answer: Every template includes detailed video tutorials. If you still need help, you can reach out to our support team. Bundle customers get priority support with faster response times.

faqs.question: Is Framer free to use?
faqs.answer: Framer offers a free plan that lets you build and publish a basic website. For custom domains and advanced features, they offer paid plans. All our templates include 3 months of Framer Pro to get you started.
